resources.string: Uporabite gumb %1$s, da preklopite prepoznavanje glasu, gumb %2$s, da odprete to pogovorno okno za pomoč, in meni %3$s, da spremenite nastavitve govora.
Puščice prikazujemo za več potez, ko nismo prepričani. Izgovorite barvo ali številko puščice za premikanje, da jo izberete.

string.name: instructions3
string.comment:
%1$s is "yes", %2$s is "no". Both of these are deliberately in English, which is the only language supported for voice commands.
This is a complicated concept more easy to understand in practice. Voice commands can be misheard and Lichess will not always be fully certain what you said. Several arrows will be shown to identify e.g. if the move was 'b4' or 'd4', which often sound similar. The most likely move the player wants will have a circle showing around it, but it will be possible to cancel before it is played (for example, by shouting 'no!').
You can see a visual example here: https://lichess.org/@/schlawg/blog/how-to-lichess-voice/nWrypoWI

resources.string: Če puščica prikazuje Radar, se ta poteza predvaja, ko je krog končan. V tem času lahko izgovorite samo %1$s, da takoj predvajate potezo, %2$s, da prekličete, ali izgovorite barvo/številko druge puščice. Ta časovnik lahko nastavite ali izklopite v nastavitvah.
Omogoči %s v hrupnem okolju. Držite shift, medtem ko govorite ukaze, ko je ta vklopljen.
Uporabite fonetično abecedo za izboljšanje prepoznavanja datotek šahovnice.
Premaknite se na E4 ali izberite kos e4
Igrajte želeno potezo ali potrdite nekaj
